titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 121
Senodos, Homilies of John Chrysostom

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Senodos
Senodos: 71 Ecclesiastic Canons (same as LIT2669Statut71)
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ንቀድም፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በሠናይ፡ ኅብረት፡ በጽሕፈተ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ ለአርትዖ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ቅድስት፡ ለአኅብሮተ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles to Ecclesiastic 71 Canons (same as LIT2667Statut71Title)

bibl.title: Ad suam Historiam Æthiopicam antehac editam Commentarius, In quo Multa breviter dicta fusius narrantur: contraria refelluntur: Atque hac occasione præter res Æthiopicas multa Autorum, quædam etiam S. Scripturæ loca declarantur: Aliaque plurima geographica, historica et critica, Inprimis verò antiquitatem ecclesiasticam illustrantia, alibi haud facilè obvia, exponuntur vt variarum observationum loco haberi possit
bibl.publisher: Sumptibus Johannis David Zunneri, Typis Martini Jacqueti

bibl.title: Ad suam Historiam Æthiopicam antehac editam Commentarius, In quo Multa breviter dicta fusius narrantur: contraria refelluntur: Atque hac occasione præter res Æthiopicas multa Autorum, quædam etiam S. Scripturæ loca declarantur: Aliaque plurima geographica, historica et critica, Inprimis verò antiquitatem ecclesiasticam illustrantia, alibi haud facilè obvia, exponuntur vt variarum observationum loco haberi possit
bibl.publisher: Sumptibus Johannis David Zunneri, Typis Martini Jacqueti

msItem.title: Senodos: 56 Apostolic Canons (same as LIT2670AC56)
msItem.incipit: ወእምኔሃ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ዘወሀብዎ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ካዕበ፡ በእደ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘለአኩ፡ ኀቤሁ፡ ቀዲሙ። ወይእቲ፡ ፶ወ፯፡ አናቅጸ፡ ኍልቍ።

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles to 56 Apostolic Canons (same as LIT2668AC56Title)

bibl.title: Ad suam Historiam Æthiopicam antehac editam Commentarius, In quo Multa breviter dicta fusius narrantur: contraria refelluntur: Atque hac occasione præter res Æthiopicas multa Autorum, quædam etiam S. Scripturæ loca declarantur: Aliaque plurima geographica, historica et critica, Inprimis verò antiquitatem ecclesiasticam illustrantia, alibi haud facilè obvia, exponuntur vt variarum observationum loco haberi possit
bibl.publisher: Sumptibus Johannis David Zunneri, Typis Martini Jacqueti

bibl.title: Canones Apostolorum Aethiopice

msItem.title: Senodos: Apostolic canons Abṭelisāt (81) (same as LIT2677ACABt1)
msItem.incipit:
በስመ፡ አብ፡
ዲኖዶስ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘወረደ፡ ለዋርያት፡ ቅዱሳን፡
ወይእእቲ፡ ወይእቲ፡
ዜነወ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ በእንተ፡ ጴጥሮሮስ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ መምህሩ፡ ወይእቲ፡ ትሰመይ፡ እብልጥሳን፡ ዘተጋብዑ፡ ላዕሌሃ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ዘእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወኍልቆሙ፡ ፹ወ፩፡ አብጥሊስ።

bibl.title: Ad suam Historiam Æthiopicam antehac editam Commentarius, In quo Multa breviter dicta fusius narrantur: contraria refelluntur: Atque hac occasione præter res Æthiopicas multa Autorum, quædam etiam S. Scripturæ loca declarantur: Aliaque plurima geographica, historica et critica, Inprimis verò antiquitatem ecclesiasticam illustrantia, alibi haud facilè obvia, exponuntur vt variarum observationum loco haberi possit
bibl.publisher: Sumptibus Johannis David Zunneri, Typis Martini Jacqueti

msItem.title: Senodos: Canons after the Ascension (same as LIT2673CanonsAscension)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ዜናሆሙ፡ ለሐዋርያት፡ እምድኅረ፡ ዓርገ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወአምላክነ፡ ዘአዘዘ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጸሐፈ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ በእንተ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ዘከመ፡ ሠርዑ፡ ለቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ቅድስት፡

bibl.title: Ancient Syriac documents relative to the earliest establishment of Christianity in Edessa and the neighbouring countries from the year after our Lord's ascension to the beginning of the fourth century
Reliquiae juris ecclesiastici antiquissimae: Syriace
Scriptorum veterum nova collectio e Vaticanis codicibus edita

msItem.title: Senodos: Apostolic canons Abṭelisāt (80) (same as LIT2679ACAbt2)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ዘነገረ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ወይእቲ፡ አብጥሊሳት፡ ዘተጋብኡ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ለእግዚእነ፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Canons of Simon the Canaanite 1st recension (same as LIT2639CanonsSimon1)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ቀኖና፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ንጹሓን፡ በእንተ፡ ስርዓተ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡

bibl.title: Scriptorum veterum nova collectio e Vaticanis codicibus edita
Bibliothecae Bodleianae codicum manuscriptorum orientalium catalogi partis secundae volumen primum arabicos complectens
Catalogues des manuscrits syriaques et sabéens (mandaïtes) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits orientaux

msItem.title: Senodos: Letter of Peter (same as LIT2680ClemPeter)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖደስ፡ ዘቀሌጦስ፡ ዘቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘጸሐፈ፡ ጰጥሮስ፡ ረድእ፡ ርእሰ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ዘነገረ፡ በእንተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርቶስ። ክርስቶስ።

bibl.title: Catalogus librorum manu scriptorum orientalium qui in Bibliotheca Academica Bonnensi servantur
Chirogaphorum in Bibliotheca Academica Bonnensi servatorum

series.t:title: Chirogaphorum in Bibliotheca Academica Bonnensi servatorum

msItem.title: Senodos: 81 Apostolic Canons (same as LIT2675AC81)
msItem.incipit: ሥርዓተ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ምስለ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡

bibl.title: Scriptorum veterum nova collectio e Vaticanis codicibus edita

msItem.title: Senodos: Melkite Index (same as LIT2672SenodosInMe)
Senodos: Canons of the Council of Ancyra (same as LIT2662Ancyra)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ወቀኖና፡ በትርጓሜሁ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘይደሉ፡ ለክርስቲያን፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Canons of the Council of Ancyra - titles (same as LIT2681AncyraT)
Senodos: Canons of the Council of Neo-Caesarea (same as LIT2661Canons)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘክርሰርያ፡ ኀበ፡ ተጋብዑ፡ በ፶፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ፲ወ፬፡ ትእዛዝ።
msItem.note: The canons are preceded by a table.

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Neo-Caesarea (same as LIT2682CanonsNCT)
Senodos: Canons of the Council of Nicaea, 1st recension (same as LIT2650CanonsNicaea1)
msItem.incipit: ወዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘማኅበረ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ፫፻፲ወ፰፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ በኒቅያ።

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea, 1st recension (same as LIT2687CanonsNicaea1T)
Senodos: Canons of the Council of Nicaea, 2nd recension (same as LIT2688CanonsNicaea2)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘ፫፻፲ወ፰፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ በማኅበረ፡ ዓቢይ፡ ክቡር፡ መትልው፡ ለእሙንቱ፡ ፳ወ፬፡ ፹ወ፬፡ ትእዛዝ።
msItem.note: The following is the beginning of the synodal letter: ለፍቁራን፡ አኀው፡ ፍሥሐ፡ በምክር፡ ኵልነ፡ ሀሊወነ፡ ወፍቁራን፡ አኀው፡ አንቢበነ፡ በመጽሐፍ፡ ዘተፈነወ፡ እምኀቤክሙ፡ በእንተ፡ ዘእምኀበ፡ ዕልዋን፡ ዘይመስሎ፡ ተጠምቁ፡ ገቢኦሙ።

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea, 2nd recension (same as LIT2689CanonsNicaea2T)
Senodos: Epistle 70 of Caprian (same as LIT1348Epistl)
Senodos: Discourse of the 318 Fathers of Nicaea (same as LIT1313Discou)
msItem.incipit: ነገር፡ ዘቅዱሳን፡ አበው፡ ፫፻፲ወ፰፡ ዘይከውን፡ ሕንጻ፡ ለመነኮሳት፡ በእንተ፡ ቅድስት፡ ሥላሴ፡ እምነቶሙ፡ እምነቶሙ፡ እምዛቲ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ እንተ፡ በኒቅያ፡ ሀገር፡ እምቅዱሳን፡ እንተ፡ ለአበብዎቶሙ።

msItem.title: Senodos: Canons of the Council of Gangra (same as LIT2651CanonsCouncils)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ሣልሳይ፡ እለ፡ ተጋብኡ፡ በግንግራ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ፳፡ ትእዛዝ።

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Gangra (same as LIT2683CanonsCouncilsT)
Senodos: Canons of the Council of Sardes (same as LIT2652CanonsCouncils)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባኤ፡ ስርድቄ፡ ወኍልቆሙ፡ ፻፵፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ፳ወ፩፡ ትእዛዝ፡ ተጋቢኦሙ፡ እምርሑቅ፡ በሐውርት።

msItem.title: Senodos: Canons of the Council of Antioch (same as LIT2653CanonsCouncils)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘማኅበረ፡ አንጾክያ፡ ወኍልቆሙ፡ ፲ወ፫፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ፳ወ፭፡ ትእዛዝ።

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Antioch (same as LIT1121TitlesAntioch)
Senodos: Canons of the Council of Laodicea (same as LIT2686CanonsLao)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘሎዶቅያ፡ አመ፡ ተጋብኡ፡ ፳ወ፱፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ፳ወ፱፡ ፶ወ፱፡ ትእዛዝ።

bibl.title: Bibliothecae Bodleianae codicum manuscriptorum orientalium catalogi partis secundae volumen primum arabicos complectens

msItem.title: Senodos: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Laodicea (same as LIT2685CanonsLaoT)
Senodos: Exposition of the Ten Commandments by John Chrisostom (same as LIT1371Exposi)
msItem.incipit: ትርጓሜ፡ ፲፡ ቃላት፡ ዘተርጐመ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡ ጳጳስ፡ ዘቍስጥንጥያ፡ ሀገር፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Exposition and admonition on the Role of Our Lord in Our Salvation (same as LIT2654EssenceTrinity)
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ትምህርት፡ ወሥርዓት፡ ወተግሣጽ፡ ዘተሠርዓ፡ በእንተ፡ ሕሉና፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ወትረ፡ ላዕለ፡ ሕዝብ፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Discourse on How to distinguish between Good and Evil (same as LIT2655GoodEvil)
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ትምህርት፡ ከመ፡ ይፍልጥ፡ ሠናየ፡ ወእኩየ። ግጽው፡ ወሥርዓት፡ አብስሊጢስ፡ ቀኖና፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Discourse on the Fear of God (same as LIT2656FearGod)
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ወትምህርት፡ አብስሊጢስ፡ ቀኖና፡ በእንተ፡ ፍርኀት፡ እግዚአብሔር።

msItem.title: Senodos: On the Former People of God (same as LIT2657Ancient)
msItem.incipit: ትምህርት፡ ወተግሣጽ፡ በእንተ፡ ቀዳሚ፡ ወዘለፉ፡ እስራኤል፡ አብስጥሊስ፡ ቀኖና፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ ተሠርአ፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Against the Jews (same as LIT2658Jews)
msItem.incipit: ግፅው፡ ወተግሣጽ፡ አብስልጢስ፡ ቀኖና፡ በእንተ፡ ዘዘለፎሙ፡ ወገሠጾሙ፡ ወአስተሐፈሮሙ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ጎርጎርዮስ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘአርማንያ፡ ለአይሁድ፡ እኩያን፡ እለ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ህቦ፡ ምስለ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ጎርጎርዮስ፡ በእንተ፡ ዕለ፡ ይብሉ፡ ዘተወልደ፡ እማርያም፡ ኢኮነ፡ ወልደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡

msItem.title: Senodos: On Wisdom (same as LIT2659Wisdom)
msItem.incipit: ግጽው፡ ወሥርዓተ፡ ትምህርት፡ ጥበብ፡ ወተግሣጽ፡ አብስልጢስ፡ ቀኖና፡ ለእለ፡ የአምኑ፡ ይፈቅዱ፡ ይስምዑ፡ ትምህርተ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ወሖሩ፡ በጥብ፡ ወበአእምሮ፡

msItem.title: Senodos: Penitential Canons of Peter (same as LIT2660Penit)
msItem.incipit: አብስልጢስ፡ ቀኖና፡ በእንተ፡ ንስሐ፡ ትምርት፡ ዘተሰርዓ፡ እምሀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ነዋ፡ ዕሉ፡ ወተስእሎ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እምድህረ፡ ተንሥአ፡ እሙታን፡ በደብረ፡ ዘይት፡ ወይቤሎ፡ ሊቅ፡ ንግረኒ፡ ወመሐረኒ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ንስሐ፡

msItem.title: ድርሳን፡ ዘብፁዕ፡ ዮሐን፡ አፍ፡ ወርቅ፡ ዘይትነብብ፡ በረቡዕ፡ ፋሲካ፡ በሰላመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አሜን።
msItem.incipit: ኦፍቁራን፡ አኀውየ፡ አነግረክሙ፡ ምሥጢረ፡ ቅድሳት፡ እለ፡ ይትመጠዉ።

msItem.title: ድርሳን፡ ዘብፁዕ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡ በእንተ፡ ንስሐ፡ በዓርብ፡ ወበረቡዕ፡ ስዱስ፡ ፈሲካ፡ ዘይትነብብ፡ በሰላም፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አሜን።
msItem.incipit: ኦአኀውየ፡ እለ፡ ኀደግሙ፡ ትካዘ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ከንቶ፡ ወግብሩኒ፡ ኀለፈ፡ ዑቁ፡ ወኢትግብዑ፡ ኀበ፡ ቀዳሚ፡ ትካዝክሙ።

msItem.title: Caeremoniale sacerdotum
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ዘይደሉ፡ እምሥርዓተ፡ ቅኔ፡ መላእክት፡ ዘይትፈቀድ፡ በውስተ፡ ጸሎት።

msItem.title: Regulae de Hierarchia ecclesiastica
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ስርዓተ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ወመዓርጊሃ፡ ዘአንበሩ፡ አበው፡ ቅዱሳን።

msItem.title: Quaestiones de rebus ecclesiasticis subtiliores, cum solutionibus

bibl.title: Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum orientalium qui in Museo Britannico asservantur<hi rend="italics">, III:</hi> Codices Aethiopicos amplectens

msItem.incipit: ንቀድም፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ተኀሥሦ፡ ወስእለታት፡ ዘአበው፡ ወፍካሬሆሙ፡

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa faws manfasāwi (Anonymous)
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ንቀድም፡ በረድዔተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወበኂሩተ፡ ሥምረቱ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ፈውስ፡ መንፈስዊ፡ ዘነገረ፡ ቀዳሚ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘአክበሮ፡

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa faws manfasāwi (Anonymous): Introduction, chapter 1

bibl.title: Maṣḥafa faws manfasāwi: die Geʿez-Übersetzung des arabischen Kitāb aṭ-ṭibb ar-rūḥānī ("Buch von der geistlichen Medizin") des koptischen Bischofs Michael von Aṯrīb und Malīǧ (13. Jh.). Teiledition und Kommentar

msItem.title: ቀኖና፡ ኅቡእ፡ ዘአስተጋብአ፡ አብ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወአቢይ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡ አባ፡ ታውድሮስ፡ ሊቅ፡ በደብረ፡ አስውድዮስ፡ ወበእንተ፡ ይትአመኑ፡ ኀጣውኢሆሙ፡ ዘክቡት፡ ወዘኅቡእ፡ ወበእንተ፡ መምህራን፡ እለ፡ ይትዌከፍዎሙ።
Other canons (on fornication and homicide)
27th chapter of the faws manfasāwi
Second part of the 26th chapter of the faws manfasāwi

item.desc: At the end of , the names of the owner Walda Mikāʾel and of his wife Walatta Sǝmʿon are mentioned.
At the end of , the names of Ḫadarā Mikāʾel and "his mother, Walatta Sǝmʿon" (possibly Walatta Sǝmʿon) are mentioned.

bibl.title: Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits Orientaux

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: updated refs and inserted msItems and loci in accordance with the edition of Alessandro Bausi
